name: Authentication Flow
description: Login, registration, and password recovery with OAuth support

page_briefs.login: Centered card on a clean background. Card contains email and password fields, a primary sign-in button, OAuth provider buttons, and a forgot-password link below.
page_briefs.register: Centered card matching login style. Fields for name, email, password with strength indicator. Terms checkbox and a primary register button. Link to sign-in at bottom.
page_briefs.forgot-password: Minimal centered card with email input field and a submit button. Short instructional text above the form explaining the reset process.

shells.centered: Centered card on background for auth flows
